---
name: Bug report
about: Something doesn't work (no pressure, wrong cursor, crash, ...)
labels: bug
---

<!-- The hardware details below are ESSENTIAL — tablet behaviour differs per
     model, connection, and display setup. Reports without them are usually
     impossible to act on. -->

**Setup**
- Mac model + chip (e.g. MacBook Pro M3 Pro):
- macOS version (e.g. Tahoe 26.3):
- Tablet model (e.g. Wacom Intuos CTL-4100WL) + connection (USB / Bluetooth):
- SAI version (e.g. Ver.2 64bit 2026-07-02b):
- App version (setup window title bar, or `--version`), or commit if built from source:
- Displays: single / multiple (mirrored or extended)?

**What happens**
<!-- e.g. "strokes draw but pressure is constant", "cursor jumps on 2nd screen" -->

**What you expected**

**Steps to reproduce**
1.
2.

**Checks already tried**
- [ ] Input Monitoring is granted (System Settings → Privacy & Security)
- [ ] SAI has "Use WinTab API" enabled (Others → Options → Pen Tablet) and was restarted
- [ ] The app was fully quit and reopened after granting permissions
- [ ] The "Test Tablet Pressure" bar in the setup window moves when I press the pen
